creator: mwest@freebsd.zeeb.org
text:
lock order reversal:
1st 0xffffff0145356a58 ufs (ufs) @ /usr/src/sys/kern/vfs_mount.c:1202
2nd 0xffffff01824d37e8 syncer (syncer) @ /usr/src/sys/kern/vfs_subr.c:2197
KDB: stack backtrace:
db_trace_self_wrapper() at db_trace_self_wrapper+0x2a
_witness_debugger() at _witness_debugger+0x2e
witness_checkorder() at witness_checkorder+0x81e
__lockmgr_args() at __lockmgr_args+0xc91
vop_stdlock() at vop_stdlock+0x39
VOP_LOCK1_APV() at VOP_LOCK1_APV+0x9b
_vn_lock() at _vn_lock+0x57
vrele() at vrele+0x151
dounmount() at dounmount+0x2ac
unmount() at unmount+0x24b
syscall() at syscall+0x1e7
Xfast_syscall() at Xfast_syscall+0xab
--- syscall (22, FreeBSD ELF64, unmount), rip = 0x8007c22cc, rsp = 0x7fffffffe8e8, rbp = 0 ---
